requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — General Luminaire (IANORQ conformity, NA/IEC 60598-1)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——通用灯具（IANORQ 合格评定，NA/IEC 60598-1）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——通用燈具（IANORQ 合格評定，NA/IEC 60598-1）

summary.en: LED luminaires placed on the Angolan market are expected to meet electrical-safety requirements based on the IEC 60598 series, which IANORQ (Instituto Angolano de Normalizacao e Qualidade) adopts as Angolan national NA standards. The reference for general luminaires is NA/IEC 60598-1 (Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests), covering protection against electric shock, creepage and clearance, thermal endurance, mechanical strength, and terminals. Angola does not operate an EU-style self-declared CE regime; instead, regulated products typically undergo IANORQ conformity assessment and import inspection, often supported by an IEC-based test report (an IECEE CB Scheme test report and certificate are widely accepted as the underlying technical evidence). The Angolan grid is 220 V / 50 Hz, so products designed for 220-240 V single-phase 50 Hz operation are generally electrically suitable, but plug/connector and marking conventions must match Angolan practice. Documentation, safety markings, and instructions are generally required in Portuguese, and a local in-country importer/representative is needed to clear and place goods.
summary.zh: 在安哥拉市场销售的 LED 灯具预期须满足基于 IEC 60598 系列的电气安全要求——IANORQ（安哥拉标准化与质量研究所）将该系列采用为安哥拉国家 NA 标准。通用灯具的参考为 NA/IEC 60598-1（灯具——第 1 部分：一般要求与试验），涵盖防触电、爬电距离与电气间隙、热耐久性、机械强度及接线端子。安哥拉不实施欧盟式自我声明 CE 制度；受管制产品通常须经 IANORQ 合格评定及进口检验，并常以基于 IEC 的检测报告作为支撑（IECEE CB 体系检测报告及证书作为底层技术证据被广泛接受）。安哥拉电网为 220 V / 50 Hz，因此为 220-240 V 单相 50 Hz 运行设计的产品在电气上一般适用，但插头/连接器及标志惯例须符合安哥拉做法。文件、安全标志及说明书通常须以葡萄牙语提供，且须由在地进口商/代表完成清关与投放。
summary.zht: 在安哥拉市場銷售的 LED 燈具預期須滿足基於 IEC 60598 系列的電氣安全要求——IANORQ（安哥拉標準化與質量研究所）將該系列採用為安哥拉國家 NA 標準。通用燈具的參考為 NA/IEC 60598-1（燈具——第 1 部分：一般要求與試驗），涵蓋防觸電、爬電距離與電氣間隙、熱耐久性、機械強度及接線端子。安哥拉不實施歐盟式自我聲明 CE 制度；受管制產品通常須經 IANORQ 合格評定及進口檢驗，並常以基於 IEC 的檢測報告作為支撐（IECEE CB 體系檢測報告及證書作為底層技術證據被廣泛接受）。安哥拉電網為 220 V / 50 Hz，因此為 220-240 V 單相 50 Hz 運行設計的產品在電氣上一般適用，但插頭/連接器及標誌慣例須符合安哥拉做法。文件、安全標誌及說明書通常須以葡萄牙語提供，且須由在地進口商/代表完成清關與投放。

standards_or_laws: NA/IEC 60598-1 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (IEC standard adopted as an Angolan NA standard by IANORQ)
IANORQ conformity assessment and import inspection for regulated products (Instituto Angolano de Normalizacao e Qualidade)

summary.en: China's current general luminaire safety standard is GB/T 7000.1-2023 (Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests), replacing GB 7000.1-2015 from 1 January 2026, with the designation changing from mandatory GB to recommended GB/T. CCC obligations for in-scope luminaires remain governed by CNCA rules rather than the GB/T designation alone, and CCC testing is performed by CNCA-authorized laboratories. Both the Chinese standard and the Angolan NA reference derive from the same IEC 60598-1 base, so the underlying technical content is broadly comparable, but the conformity-assessment route, documentation language, and accepting authority differ.
summary.zh: 中国现行通用灯具安全标准为 GB/T 7000.1-2023（灯具——第 1 部分：一般要求与试验），自 2026 年 1 月 1 日起取代 GB 7000.1-2015，标准属性由强制性 GB 调整为推荐性 GB/T。范围内灯具的 CCC 义务仍由 CNCA 规则决定，而非仅由 GB/T 标识决定；CCC 检测由 CNCA 授权实验室进行。中国标准与安哥拉 NA 参考均源自同一 IEC 60598-1 基础，底层技术内容大致相当，但合格评定路径、文件语言及受理机关不同。
summary.zht: 中國現行通用燈具安全標準為 GB/T 7000.1-2023（燈具——第 1 部分：一般要求與試驗），自 2026 年 1 月 1 日起取代 GB 7000.1-2015，標準屬性由強制性 GB 調整為推薦性 GB/T。範圍內燈具的 CCC 義務仍由 CNCA 規則決定，而非僅由 GB/T 標識決定；CCC 檢測由 CNCA 授權實驗室進行。中國標準與安哥拉 NA 參考均源自同一 IEC 60598-1 基礎，底層技術內容大致相當，但合格評定路徑、文件語言及受理機關不同。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 7000.1-2023 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (replaces GB 7000.1-2015 from 1 January 2026; recommended GB/T designation)
CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires

gap.en: Both the Angolan NA reference and GB/T 7000.1 share the IEC 60598-1 technical base, so a luminaire engineered to the IEC series is a good starting point for both markets. The gap is procedural rather than purely technical: (1) Angola routes market access through IANORQ conformity assessment and import inspection, not Chinese CCC — a CCC certificate does not by itself satisfy Angolan requirements, and an IEC-based test report (e.g. IECEE CB report aligned to IEC 60598-1) is typically the evidence Angolan importers rely on; (2) documentation, labels, and user instructions generally must be in Portuguese, whereas CN documentation is in Chinese; (3) an in-country importer/representative is required to clear and place goods in Angola; (4) plug/connector type and product marking must match Angolan practice for the 220 V / 50 Hz grid. Because Angola adopts IEC rather than EU national deviations, EU-specific EN-version differences are usually not the issue — confirm the exact NA reference number and any IANORQ-required test report with the importer.
gap.zh: 安哥拉 NA 参考与 GB/T 7000.1 同以 IEC 60598-1 为技术基础，因此按 IEC 系列设计的灯具对两个市场都是良好起点。差距更多在程序而非纯技术：（1）安哥拉通过 IANORQ 合格评定及进口检验实现市场准入，而非中国 CCC——CCC 证书本身不满足安哥拉要求，安哥拉进口商通常依赖基于 IEC 的检测报告（如对齐 IEC 60598-1 的 IECEE CB 报告）；（2）文件、标签及用户说明书通常须以葡萄牙语提供，而中国文件为中文；（3）须由在地进口商/代表在安哥拉完成清关与投放；（4）插头/连接器类型及产品标志须符合安哥拉 220 V / 50 Hz 电网的做法。由于安哥拉采用 IEC 而非欧盟国家偏差，欧盟特有的 EN 版本差异通常不是问题——请与进口商确认确切 NA 参考编号及 IANORQ 要求的任何检测报告。
gap.zht: 安哥拉 NA 參考與 GB/T 7000.1 同以 IEC 60598-1 為技術基礎，因此按 IEC 系列設計的燈具對兩個市場都是良好起點。差距更多在程序而非純技術：（1）安哥拉通過 IANORQ 合格評定及進口檢驗實現市場准入，而非中國 CCC——CCC 證書本身不滿足安哥拉要求，安哥拉進口商通常依賴基於 IEC 的檢測報告（如對齊 IEC 60598-1 的 IECEE CB 報告）；（2）文件、標籤及用戶說明書通常須以葡萄牙語提供，而中國文件為中文；（3）須由在地進口商/代表在安哥拉完成清關與投放；（4）插頭/連接器類型及產品標誌須符合安哥拉 220 V / 50 Hz 電網的做法。由於安哥拉採用 IEC 而非歐盟國家偏差，歐盟特有的 EN 版本差異通常不是問題——請與進口商確認確切 NA 參考編號及 IANORQ 要求的任何檢測報告。

mandatory_status.target: Expected mandatory — electrical safety to NA/IEC 60598-1 via IANORQ conformity assessment and import inspection for regulated luminaires; confirm exact NA reference and required test report with IANORQ / the in-country importer
mandatory_status.cn: CCC mandatory where the luminaire remains within CNCA-C10-01 scope; the general luminaire safety standard changed from mandatory GB 7000.1-2015 to recommended GB/T 7000.1-2023 from 1 January 2026

source.publisher: ISO member directory — IANORQ (Instituto Angolano de Normalizacao e Qualidade), Angola

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED luminaires for Angola should be built to the IEC 60598-1 base that IANORQ adopts as the NA standard, with market access via IANORQ conformity assessment and import inspection rather than an EU-style self-declared CE mark. A Chinese CCC certificate and GB/T 7000.1 evidence do not by themselves satisfy Angolan requirements; an IEC-based test report (e.g. IECEE CB to IEC 60598-1), Portuguese documentation, and an in-country importer/representative are the practical pathway. Confirm the exact NA reference number and any required test report with IANORQ or the importer before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向安哥拉的 LED 灯具应按 IANORQ 采用为 NA 标准的 IEC 60598-1 基础制造，并通过 IANORQ 合格评定及进口检验实现市场准入，而非欧盟式自我声明 CE 标志。中国 CCC 证书及 GB/T 7000.1 证据本身不满足安哥拉要求；基于 IEC 的检测报告（如对齐 IEC 60598-1 的 IECEE CB）、葡萄牙语文件及在地进口商/代表是务实路径。出货前请与 IANORQ 或进口商确认确切 NA 参考编号及任何必需的检测报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向安哥拉的 LED 燈具應按 IANORQ 採用為 NA 標準的 IEC 60598-1 基礎製造，並通過 IANORQ 合格評定及進口檢驗實現市場准入，而非歐盟式自我聲明 CE 標誌。中國 CCC 證書及 GB/T 7000.1 證據本身不滿足安哥拉要求；基於 IEC 的檢測報告（如對齊 IEC 60598-1 的 IECEE CB）、葡萄牙語文件及在地進口商/代表是務實路徑。出貨前請與 IANORQ 或進口商確認確切 NA 參考編號及任何必需的檢測報告。

requirement_topic.en: Self-Ballasted LED Lamp Safety (NA/IEC 62560) and Bulb Replacement Market
requirement_topic.zh: 自镇流 LED 灯安全（NA/IEC 62560）及替换灯泡市场
requirement_topic.zht: 自鎮流 LED 燈安全（NA/IEC 62560）及替換燈泡市場

summary.en: Self-ballasted LED lamps (retrofit bulbs with E27/B22 or similar caps for general lighting >50 V) sold in Angola are expected to meet the safety requirements of IEC 62560, which IANORQ adopts as the Angolan NA standard NA/IEC 62560 (Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services by voltage > 50 V — Safety specifications). The standard covers marking, interchangeability of caps, protection against electric shock, insulation resistance, mechanical strength of the cap, fault conditions, and resistance to heat and fire. As with luminaires, market access runs through IANORQ conformity assessment and import inspection rather than an EU-style CE self-declaration, and an IEC-based test report (e.g. an IECEE CB report to IEC 62560) is the typical underlying technical evidence. Lamps must be designed for the Angolan 220 V / 50 Hz single-phase supply and carry Portuguese-language safety and rating information; the in-country importer is responsible for clearance and placement.
summary.zh: 在安哥拉销售的自镇流 LED 灯（用于通用照明、电压 > 50 V、带 E27/B22 或类似灯头的替换灯泡）预期须满足 IEC 62560 的安全要求——IANORQ 将其采用为安哥拉 NA 标准 NA/IEC 62560（电压 > 50 V 通用照明用自镇流 LED 灯——安全规范）。该标准涵盖标志、灯头互换性、防触电、绝缘电阻、灯头机械强度、故障条件以及耐热与耐火性。与灯具相同，市场准入通过 IANORQ 合格评定及进口检验，而非欧盟式 CE 自我声明，基于 IEC 的检测报告（如对齐 IEC 62560 的 IECEE CB 报告）为典型底层技术证据。灯须为安哥拉 220 V / 50 Hz 单相供电设计，并带有葡萄牙语安全与额定信息；在地进口商负责清关与投放。
summary.zht: 在安哥拉銷售的自鎮流 LED 燈（用於通用照明、電壓 > 50 V、帶 E27/B22 或類似燈頭的替換燈泡）預期須滿足 IEC 62560 的安全要求——IANORQ 將其採用為安哥拉 NA 標準 NA/IEC 62560（電壓 > 50 V 通用照明用自鎮流 LED 燈——安全規範）。該標準涵蓋標誌、燈頭互換性、防觸電、絕緣電阻、燈頭機械強度、故障條件以及耐熱與耐火性。與燈具相同，市場准入通過 IANORQ 合格評定及進口檢驗，而非歐盟式 CE 自我聲明，基於 IEC 的檢測報告（如對齊 IEC 62560 的 IECEE CB 報告）為典型底層技術證據。燈須為安哥拉 220 V / 50 Hz 單相供電設計，並帶有葡萄牙語安全與額定信息；在地進口商負責清關與投放。

standards_or_laws: NA/IEC 62560 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services by voltage > 50 V — Safety specifications (IEC standard adopted as an Angolan NA standard by IANORQ)
IANORQ conformity assessment and import inspection for regulated products

summary.en: China's equivalent for self-ballasted LED lamp safety is GB 24906-2010 (Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services by voltage > 50 V — Safety requirements), technically aligned with IEC 62560. Self-ballasted LED lamps in scope for the Chinese residential market are subject to CCC (China Compulsory Certification) under CNCA rules, with testing by CNCA-authorized laboratories. The Chinese standard shares the IEC 62560 technical base with the Angolan NA reference, so the underlying construction and test requirements are broadly comparable; the certification route, documentation language, and accepting authority differ.
summary.zh: 中国对应的自镇流 LED 灯安全标准为 GB 24906-2010（普通照明用 50 V 以上自镇流 LED 灯——安全要求），技术上与 IEC 62560 对齐。面向中国居民市场范围内的自镇流 LED 灯须依 CNCA 规则取得 CCC（中国强制性产品认证），由 CNCA 授权实验室检测。中国标准与安哥拉 NA 参考同以 IEC 62560 为技术基础，底层结构与试验要求大致相当；认证路径、文件语言及受理机关不同。
summary.zht: 中國對應的自鎮流 LED 燈安全標準為 GB 24906-2010（普通照明用 50 V 以上自鎮流 LED 燈——安全要求），技術上與 IEC 62560 對齊。面向中國居民市場範圍內的自鎮流 LED 燈須依 CNCA 規則取得 CCC（中國強制性產品認證），由 CNCA 授權實驗室檢測。中國標準與安哥拉 NA 參考同以 IEC 62560 為技術基礎，底層結構與試驗要求大致相當；認證路徑、文件語言及受理機關不同。

standards_or_laws: GB 24906-2010 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services by voltage > 50 V — Safety requirements (SAC/SAMR)
CNCA CCC rules — applicable to self-ballasted LED lamps in scope for the Chinese market

gap.en: GB 24906 and the Angolan NA/IEC 62560 reference both derive from IEC 62560, so a lamp engineered to the IEC standard generally meets the substantive construction and safety requirements of both markets. The practical gaps are: (1) market access in Angola is through IANORQ conformity assessment and import inspection, not Chinese CCC — a CCC certificate is not sufficient on its own, and an IEC 62560-based test report (e.g. IECEE CB) is the evidence importers typically present; (2) cap/voltage and marking must match Angolan 220 V / 50 Hz practice; (3) safety and rating markings and any instructions must generally be in Portuguese; (4) an in-country importer/representative is required. Note that the Angolan energy-labelling programme (see ledao-ecodesign) may apply to these lamps in addition to safety — confirm the lamp falls within the labelled scope.
gap.zh: GB 24906 与安哥拉 NA/IEC 62560 参考均源自 IEC 62560，因此按 IEC 标准设计的灯一般满足两市场的实质性结构与安全要求。务实差距为：（1）安哥拉市场准入通过 IANORQ 合格评定及进口检验，而非中国 CCC——CCC 证书本身不足，基于 IEC 62560 的检测报告（如 IECEE CB）为进口商通常提交的证据；（2）灯头/电压及标志须符合安哥拉 220 V / 50 Hz 做法；（3）安全与额定标志及任何说明书通常须以葡萄牙语提供；（4）须有在地进口商/代表。注意安哥拉能效标识计划（见 ledao-ecodesign）除安全外可能也适用于这些灯——请确认该灯属于标识适用范围。
gap.zht: GB 24906 與安哥拉 NA/IEC 62560 參考均源自 IEC 62560，因此按 IEC 標準設計的燈一般滿足兩市場的實質性結構與安全要求。務實差距為：（1）安哥拉市場准入通過 IANORQ 合格評定及進口檢驗，而非中國 CCC——CCC 證書本身不足，基於 IEC 62560 的檢測報告（如 IECEE CB）為進口商通常提交的證據；（2）燈頭/電壓及標誌須符合安哥拉 220 V / 50 Hz 做法；（3）安全與額定標誌及任何說明書通常須以葡萄牙語提供；（4）須有在地進口商/代表。注意安哥拉能效標識計劃（見 ledao-ecodesign）除安全外可能也適用於這些燈——請確認該燈屬於標識適用範圍。

mandatory_status.target: Expected mandatory — self-ballasted LED lamp safety to NA/IEC 62560 via IANORQ conformity assessment and import inspection; confirm exact NA reference and required test report with IANORQ / the in-country importer
mandatory_status.cn: CCC mandatory for self-ballasted LED lamps in scope for the Chinese market under CNCA rules; GB 24906-2010 is the applicable safety standard

source.publisher: ISO member directory — IANORQ (Instituto Angolano de Normalizacao e Qualidade), Angola

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Self-ballasted LED retrofit lamps for Angola should be built to the IEC 62560 base that IANORQ adopts as NA/IEC 62560, with market access via IANORQ conformity assessment and import inspection. A Chinese CCC certificate to GB 24906 is not by itself accepted in Angola; an IEC 62560-based test report (e.g. IECEE CB), Portuguese markings, and an in-country importer are the practical pathway. Confirm the exact NA reference, the lamp cap/voltage suitability for 220 V / 50 Hz, and whether the national energy label applies before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向安哥拉的自镇流 LED 替换灯应按 IANORQ 采用为 NA/IEC 62560 的 IEC 62560 基础制造，并通过 IANORQ 合格评定及进口检验实现市场准入。中国按 GB 24906 取得的 CCC 证书本身不被安哥拉接受；基于 IEC 62560 的检测报告（如 IECEE CB）、葡萄牙语标志及在地进口商是务实路径。出货前请确认确切 NA 参考、灯头/电压对 220 V / 50 Hz 的适用性，以及是否适用国家能效标识。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向安哥拉的自鎮流 LED 替換燈應按 IANORQ 採用為 NA/IEC 62560 的 IEC 62560 基礎製造，並通過 IANORQ 合格評定及進口檢驗實現市場准入。中國按 GB 24906 取得的 CCC 證書本身不被安哥拉接受；基於 IEC 62560 的檢測報告（如 IECEE CB）、葡萄牙語標誌及在地進口商是務實路徑。出貨前請確認確切 NA 參考、燈頭/電壓對 220 V / 50 Hz 的適用性，以及是否適用國家能效標識。
